successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave/leave-application.service.ts exists and exports ILeaveApplicationService interface and LeaveApplicationService class with all five method signatures as pure skeletons (only comments and 'throw new Error("Method not implemented");')

src/modules/leave/leave.repository.ts exists and exports ILeaveRepository interface with createLeaveRequest, updateLeaveRequestStatus, findLeaveRequestById, and findLeaveRequestsByEmployeeId method signatures
All method signatures in ILeaveApplicationService and ILeaveRepository have complete parameter types and return types with no implementation
LeaveApplicationService constructor dependencies are properly typed (ILeaveRepository, PolicyService, BalanceService, AuditLogger, EventPublisher)
Transaction semantics comments are preserved exactly as specified in phase architecture for createLeaveRequest, submitLeaveRequest, and cancelLeaveRequest methods

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces (GP-001)
Audit records: All state-changing operations write an audit record (GP-002)
Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing (GP-003)
No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data (GP-004)
RBAC enforcement: All API endpoints enforce role-based access control (GP-005)
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled (GP-006)
Dependency direction: leave -> employee, leave -> policy, leave -> balance, leave -> notification
All method bodies must be pure skeletons with only comments ending with 'throw new Error("Method not implemented");'
No method calls on policyService, balanceService, auditLogger, eventPublisher, or leaveRepository inside method bodies
outOfScope: Implementation of any service method logic
Integration with other modules beyond type references
